commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "Permission Audit Closeout Handoff Decision Binding" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js

preliminary_expected_failures.failure_reason: CP00-080 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-080.
docs/closeout-packs/cp00-080/manifest.json did not exist before pack evidence creation.
The first post-evidence generation attempt found CP00-080 next_subphase RP00.P06.M10.S04, which is not present in docs/weighted-implementation-ledger.json because RP00.P06.M10 ends at S03.
resolved_by: CP00-080 source, fixture, contract, and evidence next_subphase corrected to RP00.P07.M00.S01
CP00-080 source and phase terminal flags corrected to true
npm run closeout-pack-plan:generate rerun with exit_code 0

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json "$(cat /tmp/cp00-080-review-prompt.txt)"

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: One valid claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed before production_ready.
evidence_summary.upstream_boundary: CP00-080 consumes CP00-079 and requires upstream next_subphase RP00.P06.M09.S08.
evidence_summary.finding_resolution: Claude P3 F1 and F2 were fixed with assembler-to-published evidence assertions and command_evidence_ref path pinning; F3 was adjudicated as intentional defense-in-depth because strict upstream validation precedes redundant CP00-080 boundary checks.
evidence_summary.ldip_boundary: LDIP remains planning-only; no LDIP implementation is introduced by CP00-080.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-080 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime Claude review, runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, Hermes evidence packet writes, command evidence writes, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, approval, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerate closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-080 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json with 1173 packs and 53812 units; generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json with 14 locked/corrected next-queue packs; queue starts after CP00-080.

final_validation_summary.syntax_checks: node --check passed for policies, service, validators, service tests, scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs, and scripts/validate-closeout-pack.mjs.
final_validation_summary.targeted_tests: node --test --test-name-pattern "Permission Audit Closeout Handoff Decision Binding" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js passed 7/7.
final_validation_summary.cursor_correction: CP00-080 terminal next_subphase is RP00.P07.M00.S01, matching the ledger and next planned CP00-081 boundary.
